# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Managed math and WASM update**

## Highlights

This unreleased build ports SKPMColor math to managed code and updates the WASM runtime.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## API Surface

- **SKPMColor premultiply and unpremultiply ported to managed integer math** — Single-value SKPMColor premultiplication and unpremultiplication now run as pure managed integer arithmetic, avoiding a native round-trip for these hot-path operations. ([#4385](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4385))

## Platform

- **WASM runtime built with Emscripten 5.0.6 and new exception handling** — The WebAssembly native libraries are rebuilt with Emscripten 5.0.6 using the new exnref-based exception handling model. ([#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487))
